author: design-phase-2b-layout-md-7617
content: Result: Implemented vitreous_layout crate with 4 files. tree.rs: 14 types (NodeId, Dimension, Size, Rect, DimensionRect, LayoutStyle, MeasureConstraint, MeasureFn, LayoutInput, LayoutOutput, NodeLayout, plus Display/FlexDirection/FlexWrap/JustifyContent/AlignItems/AlignSelf/AlignContent/Position/Overflow enums) with full taffy conversion layer. compute.rs: compute_layout() builds taffy tree, runs flexbox, extracts absolute positions. boundary.rs: is_layout_boundary(), find_boundary_ancestor(), find_relayout_roots() for incremental re-layout. lib.rs: re-exports all public API. 20 tests covering all 11 acceptance criteria. All clippy and fmt clean.
